name: Railways
citation: Fogel 1964 (US social saving ~3% GNP); Hawke 1970 (UK ~4-5% GDP); Fishlow (private return 8-10%, social ROR ~15%); Mitchell British Historical Statistics; Campbell on 1840s debt 40-60% of capital
caveat: ordinal cross-era placement; social savings (% GDP) and dividend yields are not the live Cp/Cs ratio units

name: Electrification
citation: David 1990 (Dynamo & Computer); Devine 1983 (+20-30% plant productivity); utility ROE 7-10%; SEC/FTC Insull holding-company investigations (debt+preferred >70% at holding layers, 1932 collapse)
caveat: system was sound; the Insull financing EDGE was Ponzi - shown at the fragile end. Cross-era units differ

name: Telecoms & fibre
citation: Goolsbee-Klenow 2006 (internet consumer surplus); Brynjolfsson-Collis (search surplus); Altman (2002 telecom default rate 20.3%); WorldCom debt/EBITDA >4x; FCC Statistics of Communications Common Carriers
caveat: investors wiped out, society kept the fibre - the canonical productive bubble. Cross-era units differ
